feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Application Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Application Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Not able to use Workflow capability when starting App from Business Application Studio.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I developed an App that uses the Workflow capabilites from SAP Build Process Automation. After deploying the App to the Launchpad, everything works fine (using managed application router).

But if I start the App from within BAS ("npm start") the fetching of the XSRF-Token fails. Read-Access on the Workflow service is working. 

I can read workflow instances etc. without problems but if I try to change something on an instance and therefore try to fetch a XSRF-Token it fails with "403 User does not have sufficient privileges." 

I am using the same user in BAS as in Launchpad, so I wonder why there should be an authorization Problem with my user.

This is my xs-app.json:

And this is the relevant part of my ui5.yaml:

I also tried these parameters, no success:

My User has these Roles:

 


Any hint is highly appreciated...

Regards,
Jürgen

entry.title: how to add a header message within the tile?
entry.content: Can we add a custom message at the fiori header.

entry.title: How to deploy SAPUI5 apps on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

I am currently involving on a SAP S/4HANA Public Edition implementation and we have some requirements that requires custom development. These developments must built using SAPUI5. I would like confirming if it is possible to implement these developments on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public. I have looked at documentation for that, but I have not found definitively answer.

Best regard,

Anthony

SAPUI5 SAP Fiori SAP ERP SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP Business Application Studio SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Intrastat data SAP4HANA help needed
entry.content:
Hello All Dear Users,

I need pull out data listed below from SAP4HANA to outside software and I am looking for advise if my required data can be pull out and where I can find them all.

 Arrivals /Dispatches                                                    

Commodity code*
Description of the goods
Nature of the transaction
Country of consignment
Country of origin
Net mass (weight) in KG
Supplementary units**
Invoice net amount in reporting currency
Statistical Invoice value
Mode of transport
Delivery terms
Port/Airport
Regime code
Region of destination
Supplier VAT number/Customer VAT number

entry.title: Type generator is not installed in your CDS Project
entry.content:
Hello All,

Using Joule, in SAP Build - Business Application Studio, when I try to generate an Entity and service using AI Joule, I am getting the error message: "TyperNotInstalledError: Will not attempt to generate types as the Type generator is not installed in your CDS Project. Install @cap-js/code-typer as dependency of your project to enable type generation for this project."

Is Joule not going to install the necessary files by itself?

What are the steps to be taken to overcome this issue?

Thanks,

Srihari

entry.title: Request failed with status code 403 in sap in Business application studio.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I have developed SAP Fiori report apps in BAS getting below error while deploying it on ABAP repository. i have cross-check with ABAP developer as well but not able to identify the root cause. Please look into this issue and provide solution ASAP.

below is the error which display while deploying app.

error builder:custom deploy-to-abap Request failed with status code 403 in sap

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Add Custom Action to Object Page Header toolbar using BAS Adaptation.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Please guide me to add Custom Action to Object Page Header toolbar using BAS Adaptation. I have seen and followed the article :

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/7619517a92414e27b71f02094bd08d06

and seen the sample :

https://ui5.sap.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/controllerExtensions/controllerExtensionsOverview

but the problem is: In adaptation project we dont have manifest.json but manifest.appdescr_variant , where when I am doing changes it is not working , how can i proceed with it.

Any help is highly appreciated.

Regards

Rakesh

entry.title: Fiori ALP Visual Filter display error in RAP
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm experiencing an issue with displaying the Visual Filter on a Fiori app, which I generated using the List Page Template. On the app screen, the Visual Filter shows an error, and when I debug, it seems that the service encounters a problem with the orderby syntax. Please could you provide me with suggestions or documentation to resolve this issue? Thanks a lot.

Image display error

Image $batch request error
URL: GET Travel?$orderby=TotalPrice_sum%20desc&$apply=groupby((CurrencyCode,OverallStatus,OverallStatusText),aggregate(TotalPrice%20with%20sum%20as%20TotalPrice_sum))&$skip=0&$top=3

 

If I using orderby with other field its working fine
URL: GET Travel?$orderby=OverallStatus%20desc&$apply=groupby((CurrencyCode,OverallStatus,OverallStatusText),aggregate(TotalPrice%20with%20sum%20as%20TotalPrice_sum))&$skip=0&$top=3

entry.title: Deployment of Fiori application to CF: Issue with metadata/Odata calls
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have deployed a fiori application built using SAP BAS, where the datamodel was consumed from an onpremise S4HANA system.

 

Cloud connector and Destinations are configured. PFB Destination config

 

The app works fine in preview mode in BAS. Data from onpremise system is viewed properly. However, after deployment of app to cloud foundry, the metadata calls fail with status code 500 : error: 500 Internal Server Error.

Please let me know if there's anything else to be done. 

@gregorw , @Edrilan_Berisha , @N1kh1l 

 

Thanks & Regards,

Karthik

entry.title: IDOC FAILURE AT EWM SYSTEM
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have several idocs processed from ERP but are failing at EWM system. The idoc error is framed as- "No means of transport found for packaging material XXXXXXXX". If anyone has any idea on how to resolve this issue pls help urgently.

entry.title: How to enhance the Request Material(MDG) App Lean App ID(F0502)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Example Requirement: Enhance the Standard "Request Material(MDG)" app to have a Custom field and send to MDG backend staging table. From MDG the custom field will be mapped to standard Manufacture part number.

1) Front end: Is there any way to Enhance "Request Material(MDG)" via BAS and in BAS this app itself is not loading via adaptation project as the Fiori Library shows Enhancement points. In WEB IDE can we do extensions, we are using development tool BAS and how to get the license for webide full stack in BTP.

2) Backend: The Service Associated With the app is MDG_MATERIAL_SRV which should be extended with Z service can we use CFL instead of Append structure.

entry.title: How to retrieve value from modal window?
entry.content:
Hi!

Another problem with modal window, this time such one:

I can retrieve the value total available stock with text function, but I am not able to retrieve the values from the grey fields. I tried with property 

  • ShowMessageBox

but it doesn`t work. Also the tracker does not register these fields. Has someone any idea?

entry.title: My BAS dev space remains in status "Starting"
entry.content:
My BAS dev space remains in status "Starting" for a long time, ID "ws-4rjd9"

It is not a free account, How do resolve this? Any inputs?

entry.title: How to call a Rest API in a Fiori App and show the result in a List
entry.content:
I want to develop a Fiori App which i can later add to the Fiori Launchpad. The App should call a REST API, and the result of the API should be displayed as a list in the Fiori App. 

I did create a few Fiori Apps with the SAP Tutorials, like this one https://developers.sap.com/group.sap-fiori-app-purchase-req.html 

All the tutorials i completed used eclipse to create Services, which i can access from SAP Business Application Studio. I understand that these Services in Eclipse are so called CDS Views, which only show Data from a Database. Can i also show Data from a API in these CDS Views or do i need to use another Technology for my requirement?

The Fiori App should work in an On-Premise System and in the ABAP-Cloud.

entry.title: HANA Cloud / Hana procedure execution by multiple instances/workers
entry.content:
Hello Colleagues,

I have a procedure which mostly take some entries from a table(built as a queue) and then sends the values as input parameters to a calculation view and the result inserts in a table.
The thing is that the amount of records is huge(hundreds of millions) so i was searching for kind of paralel execution.
With the execute parallel explicit statement in a procedure it wouldn't work, because of concurency, but with multiple procedure runs it works.
Could anyone give me some insights in this direction? how to run multiple times the same proc to improve the processing time? Are there any limitations? Which setting should be changed in hana?


Thank you in advance,

Best regards,

Ghenadie

entry.title: Hello Experts, Is there a way to extend sap fiori app ( Request Material MDG ) in BAS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there a way to extend sap fiori app ( Request Material MDG ) in BAS. 

when creating adaptation project in BAS we are not getting the option to extend for this particular app. 

or is there any other way to extend this app. 

P.S : SAP WEB IDE is not available as account is in cloud foundry environment.

entry.title: Loading Reuse S1 Component from Manage Material coverage app gives errors
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I have deployed pp_mrp_reuses1(F0844) component as a custom library into abap repo. my aim is to run the extended version of app Manage Material Coverage(F0251) which should use a fragment of my custom library where i have extended my fields for the table.. To open Manage material i already have extended Monitor Material coverage app(F0247A).  all three apps are deployed onto the repository.

 
Problem i am facing is when i navigate from monitor materials to manage materials app i am getting an error from the library files of the standard reuse component pp_mrp_reuses1.
I am able to load my custom Reuse Library that i can see from sources but error comes up in the standard part of the library somehow. Random errors in S3parent of standard reuse component come-up.
I see all three extended/adapted apps running in the sources.
For navigation i am using 
sap.ushell.Container.getService("CrossApplicationNavigation")  
toExternal method. with my semantic object action and parameters opening my extended version of the manage materials app.
So confused as to what piece of this puzzle is a miss??

entry.title: Bind App to hdi-container with specific role or read-only privilege (cloud foundry)
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to bind an application to a hdi-container in such way that the application can only read from it.

So either to specify somewhere grant the role "XXX" to _RT  or restrict the privilege to SELECT on the schema.

Any idea how to perform this restriction ?

Thank you

Yann

entry.title: Sap Business One 10.00 update SP 2402
entry.content:
I would like to ask if anyone is facing the same problem as me.

We updated our system from version 10.0 (10.00.240) FP 2305 to version 10.0 (10.00.240) SP 2402 and we are experiencing slowdowns on several computers after this update.

Before the update, we did not have this problem.

Computers keep freezing the screen, slow to open other applications.

After restarting the computer it works fine for a moment, until it starts to crash again after a few minutes of using SAP.

What is happening?

entry.title: Problems when opening a PDF in my SAPUI5 app
entry.content:
Hello Experts, good day.

I have the following doubt.

We are using PDFViewer to be able to view a PDF document in a fiori app.

The problem is that when we call it, PDFViewer does not show the PDF and immediately afterward, it opens a window to download the file.

Do you know why this is happening?

This is the code I use for the PDFViewer.

 

 

                var sServiceURL = ".../ZFI_LIBRO_INV_PDF_SRV";
                var sSource = sServiceURL + "/pdfSet('" + sociedad + "," +  ejercicio + "," + perContable + "," + ledger + "," + A4Digitos +"')/$value";

                    var opdfViewer = new PDFViewer({
                        loaded: function (oEvent) {
                     }, error: function (oError) {                            
                     }, sourceValidationFailed: function (oEvent) {
                     } });
                    
                     opdfViewer.setSource(sSource);
                     opdfViewer.setTitle("Libro Inventario");
                     opdfViewer.open();

 

 

Could it be how the PDF was created in Odata that is causing this? Or is it some particular issue about how my call was made?

Any help is welcome.

And I can't tell you how the Odata was made or so, since I don't have access to that part of the Project due to permissions issues.

Thanks so much for reading

Greetings

EBZ.
